name: image-tools
description: Content-aware JPEG → WebP/AVIF conversion: classify image content type, look up calibrated perceptual-quality equivalents, fuzz encoder parameters, and ship the smallest file that meets the quality floor.
comment: No npm dependencies. The converter's fast (default) mode needs only cwebp + avifenc on PATH. --verify mode additionally needs ssimulacra2 (+ avifdec/dwebp, or ImageMagick). The calibration generator (calibration/) is archival and needs more — see calibration/README.md.
